name: SDL3 Complete Structured Pack
description: Structured SDL3 pack with core windowing, renderer, events, texture, properties, snippets and SDL2-to-SDL3 migration notes.

functions.name: CMake SDL3 find_package target
functions.insertText:
find_package(SDL3 REQUIRED CONFIG REQUIRED)

add_executable({{target}} {{source}})
target_link_libraries({{target}} PRIVATE SDL3::SDL3)
functions.description: CMake target skeleton for SDL3.
functions.longDescription: CMake target skeleton for SDL3.

functions.name: SDL2 to SDL3 window migration note
functions.signature: SDL2 to SDL3 window migration note
functions.insertText:
/* SDL2 -> SDL3 window migration
 * SDL_CreateWindow no longer takes x/y position parameters.
 * Use SDL_CreateWindow(title, w, h, flags) for simple windows.
 * Use SDL_CreateWindowWithProperties() when you need position, parent, external handle or advanced creation properties.
 * SDL_WINDOW_SHOWN was removed; windows are shown by default unless SDL_WINDOW_HIDDEN is set.
 * SDL_WINDOW_FULLSCREEN_DESKTOP was removed; use SDL_SetWindowFullscreenMode(window, NULL) then SDL_SetWindowFullscreen(window, true).
 */
functions.description: Reference note for common SDL2 -> SDL3 window migration changes.
functions.longDescription: Reference note for common SDL2 -> SDL3 window migration changes.
functions.declaration: SDL2 to SDL3 window migration note

functions.name: SDL2 to SDL3 renderer migration note
functions.signature: SDL2 to SDL3 renderer migration note
functions.insertText:
/* SDL2 -> SDL3 renderer migration
 * SDL_CreateRenderer(window, index, flags) became SDL_CreateRenderer(window, name).
 * SDL_RenderCopy was renamed to SDL_RenderTexture.
 * SDL_Rect integer rendering APIs have SDL_FRect / float-oriented variants in modern SDL3 examples.
 */
functions.description: Reference note for common SDL2 -> SDL3 renderer changes.
functions.longDescription: Reference note for common SDL2 -> SDL3 renderer changes.
functions.declaration: SDL2 to SDL3 renderer migration note

functions.name: SDL2 to SDL3 surface cleanup migration note
functions.signature: SDL2 to SDL3 surface cleanup migration note
functions.insertText:
/* SDL2 -> SDL3 surface cleanup
 * SDL_FreeSurface(surface) is replaced by SDL_DestroySurface(surface).
 * SDL_GetKeyboardState returns const bool * instead of Uint8 *.
 * Many SDL3 functions return bool for success/failure instead of int.
 */
functions.description: Reference note for common SDL2 -> SDL3 API cleanup and boolean return changes.
functions.longDescription: Reference note for common SDL2 -> SDL3 API cleanup and boolean return changes.
functions.declaration: SDL2 to SDL3 surface cleanup migration note
